summary_one_line: Reach deep LUT-A2B curve parsing where _cmsReadUInt16Number is called with n==NULL, gated by exact ICC tag-type magic and offset words.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile whose tag-type signature/structure bytes (the 'lcms' magic prefix, profile-class FOURCC at 0x0c, color-space FOURCC at 0x10, and tag-type offset/count words) match exactly so the parser descends into Type_LUTA2B_Read, which calls _cmsReadUInt16Number(io, NULL) at line 2565 — the only call site exercising the blocked false (n==NULL) side of line 133.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry profile-class FOURCCs ('mntr','link') at offset 0x0c and color-space tokens ('RGB ','8CLR') at 0x10 and reach the deep call chain: Type_LUTA2B_Read has W hits=8 (L hits=0) and its L2565 _cmsReadUInt16Number(io,NULL) branch shows T=0 F=8 for W versus T=0 F=0 for L, so only the winner reaches the n==NULL site.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds saturate the shallow Type_Curve_Read default arm (L1171 T=57 F=3) parsing many curves but never enter Type_LUTA2B_Read (L hits=0), so the n==NULL call at line 2565 is never executed and line 133 false side stays at F=0 for the loser.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact comparand (tag-type signature / offset words) into the matching input offsets, solving the equality gates that admit deeper LUT-A2B descent; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and cannot place the precise multi-byte FOURCC/offset values by havoc alone.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the false branch of line 133 in _cmsReadUInt16Number.
The only call site passing NULL (n==NULL, the false side) on the divergent chain is inside Type_LUTA2B_Read at line 2565.
Only the winner reaches Type_LUTA2B_Read; the loser never invokes it.
The loser saturates the shallow Type_Curve_Read default curve arm instead of descending into LUT structures.
Winner inputs carry profile-class FOURCCs at offset 0x0c distinguishing them from loser inputs.
Winner inputs carry varied color-space tokens at offset 0x10 (L/R/8/M) while loser inputs are uniformly 'R'.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so its loss against vpc is attributable to the I2S delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2330 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 009bf4fd7bb8c4ca`; the ancestor chain has an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 4, the under-current-build signature of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in cmplog.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A naive or value_profile trial reaching line 133 false side (F>0) while never executing I2SRandReplace would refute that the I2S substitution of tag-type/offset gates is what admits the deep LUT-A2B descent.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff offsets show winner/loser FOURCC differences but do not directly prove which specific equality CMP gates the Type_LUTA2B_Read entry, so the exact gated comparand is inferred from the call chain rather than observed in lineage.
